feedback.text: Most of the game publishers pays content creators to only say things that they want not their honest reviews. (Khm.. and the green logo GPU manufacturer) The publishers use the same shady communications mechanic. When you preorder a game, the publisher shall keep their promises, not changing them at the end. Publishers shall tell you when their game support will end at the time of purchase, they shall forgot the "we will tell you 30 day before shutdown" thing.
